summary: REQ-1 is partially implemented: the game now tracks incorrect selections per-option and auto-resets after 800ms to allow unlimited retries, but the diff does not provide evidence that the required red X overlay UI (matching ChooseCorrectImageGame and covering only the selected option block) was actually implemented in the rendered JSX/CSS.

missing_requirements.requirement: Show the same large red X overlay style used in ChooseCorrectImageGame (semi-transparent red overlay with a large centered X icon) on only the incorrectly selected option block in MatchWordToImageGame.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff snippet shows new state management for 'incorrect' and an 800ms reset, but the truncated MatchWordToImageGame.tsx content does not include the JSX/styling that would render a full-cover semi-transparent red overlay with a centered X icon on only the selected option. Without the render code, this UI requirement cannot be verified from the provided diff summary.
